items.briefing:
A recent study highlights that most organisations have already experienced AI-related security incidents, a concern especially relevant as Australian workplaces increasingly adopt AI tools. Separately, while overall cybercrime risk for Australians has shown some improvement, smaller businesses are now bearing the brunt — SMBs are increasingly being targeted as larger organisations strengthen their defences.

Controversies around AI provider Anthropic have also raised broader questions about trust in AI platforms your organisation may be using. **Practical tip:** Review which AI tools your staff are using and ensure they are approved by your IT team before sharing any sensitive or student information with them.

featured.title: Most firms hit by AI security incidents, study finds
featured.quote: Most Australian organisations face AI security breaches, requiring urgent defensive strategy updates.
